title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails for triggers that use the table name with a different case
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TRIGGER TestTrigger AFTER INSERT ON TestTable FOR EACH ROW BEGIN UPDATE TestTable SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = NEW.id;
ALTER TABLE TestTable RENAME TO testtable;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME with case-sensitive trigger names
